forwarding-options {
    hash-key {
        family inet {
            layer-3;
            layer-4;
        }
        family inet6 {
            layer-3;
            layer-4;
        }
        family mpls {
            all-labels;
            payload {
                ip;
            }
        }
        family multiservice {
            source-mac;
            destination-mac;
        }
    }
}
policy-options {
    policy-statement ALLOW_LOOPBACK {
        from {
            route-filter 0.0.0.0/32 orlonger;
        }
        then accept;
    }
    policy-statement LOC-PREF {
        term 1 {
            then {
                local-preference 200;
            }
        }
    }
    policy-statement PPLB {
        then {
            load-balance per-packet;
            accept;
        }
    }
    policy-statement SR_NONZERO_LOOPBACKS_V4 {
        term t1 {
            from {
                route-filter 192.168.10.0/32 exact;
            }
            then {
                prefix-segment {
                    index 200;
                }
                accept;
            }
        }
    }
    policy-statement SR_NONZERO_LOOPBACKS_V6 {
        term t1 {
            from {
                family inet6;
                route-filter 2001:db8::1:1:10:0/128 exact;
            }
            then {
                prefix-segment {
                    index 300;
                }
                accept;
            }
        }
    }
    policy-statement nhs_commu_out {
        term SET-REGION {
            then {
                community add FRONTHAUL;
                next term;
            }
        }
        term term2 {
            from {
                family evpn;
                protocol bgp;
            }
            then accept;
        }
        term nhs {
            then {
                next-hop self;
                accept;
            }
        }
    }
    community FRONTHAUL members 65535:200;
}
class-of-service {
    classifiers {
        dscp CL-DSCP {
            import default;
            forwarding-class FC-BEST-EFFORT {
                loss-priority high code-points be;
            }
            forwarding-class FC-CONTROL {
                loss-priority low code-points cs7;
            }
            forwarding-class FC-HIGH {
                loss-priority high code-points af33;
                loss-priority low code-points [ cs3 af31 ];
                loss-priority medium-high code-points af32;
            }
            forwarding-class FC-LLQ {
                loss-priority high code-points af43;
                loss-priority low code-points [ cs4 af41 ];
                loss-priority medium-high code-points af42;
            }
            forwarding-class FC-LOW {
                loss-priority high code-points af13;
                loss-priority low code-points [ cs1 af11 ];
                loss-priority medium-high code-points af12;
            }
            forwarding-class FC-MEDIUM {
                loss-priority high code-points af23;

            transmit-rate {
                remainder;
            }
            buffer-size {
                remainder;
            }
            priority low;
        }
        SC-CONTROL {
            shaping-rate percent 5;
            buffer-size percent 5;
            priority high;
        }
        SC-HIGH {
            transmit-rate percent 40;
            buffer-size percent 30;
            priority low;
        }
        SC-LLQ {
            shaping-rate percent 40;
            buffer-size percent 10;
            priority low-latency;
        }
        SC-LOW {
            transmit-rate percent 20;
            priority low;
        }
        SC-MEDIUM {
            transmit-rate percent 30;
            buffer-size percent 20;
            priority low;
        }
        SC-REALTIME {
            shaping-rate percent 30;
            buffer-size percent 20;
            priority medium-high;
        }
        SC-SIGNALING {
            shaping-rate percent 5;
            buffer-size percent 5;
            priority strict-high;
        }
    }

    family ccc {
        filter FF-MF-EVPN-VPWS-MH {
            interface-specific;
            term 1 {

                    learn-vlan-1p-priority 3;

                then forwarding-class FC-BEST-EFFORT;

            term 3 {

    auto-bandwidth {
        template {
            auto_bw_temp1 {
                adjust-interval 900;
                adjust-threshold 50;
                statistic-collection-interval 60;
                auto-bandwidth-subscription 100;
            }
        }
    }
    no-multi-topology-routing;
    router-id 192.168.1.0;
    autonomous-system 63535;
    rib-groups {
        inet3-to-inet0 {
            import-rib [ inet.3 inet.0 ];
            import-policy ALLOW_LOOPBACK;
        }
    }
    forwarding-table {
        export PPLB;
        chained-composite-next-hop {
            ingress {
                evpn;
                l3vpn;
            }
        }
    }
}

    bgp {
        group ibgp_pag {
            type internal;
            local-address 192.168.1.0;
            family inet {
                labeled-unicast {
                    rib-group inet3-to-inet0;
                    rib {
                        inet.3;
                    }
                }
            }
            family inet-vpn {
                unicast;
            }
            family inet6 {
                labeled-unicast {
                    rib {
                        inet6.3;
                    }
                }
            }
            family inet6-vpn {
                unicast;
            }
            family l2vpn {
                signaling;
            }
            family evpn {
                signaling;
            }
            family route-target;
            export nhs_commu_out;
            neighbor 192.168.1.3;
            neighbor 192.168.1.4;
        }
        log-updown;
        multipath;
    }
    isis {
        interface et-0/0/0.0 {

        }
    }
    ldp {
        interface lo0.0;
    }
    mpls {
        lsp-external-controller pccd;
        log-updown {
            syslog;
            trap;
        }
        no-propagate-ttl;
        icmp-tunneling;
        optimize-timer 180;
        ipv6-tunneling;
        interface lo0.0;
        interface ae22.0;
        interface ae25.0;
        interface et-0/0/1.0;
        interface et-0/0/0.0;
    }
    l2-learning {
        global-mac-table-aging-time 10000;
    }
}
